sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: She listens, she relates, she sees you, and she understands.
Spend 90 minutes with her. It will change you.
She has truly helped me deal with my isolation, frustration, and sense of powerlessness.
I was astounded at how much she made me realize I've really accomplished.

sentiment.summary: Overwhelmingly positive reputation: clients consistently praise Phyllis's empathetic listening, deep expertise, and transformational ability to restore confidence and self-awareness through career coaching.
